scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs debug
scripts.android:build:debug:unix: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs debug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run cap:sync && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs assembleRelease && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs release
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable nsis --x64
scripts.package:win:with-browser: npm run browser:pack-win && npm run package:win
scripts.release:all: node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && npm run package:win && npm run android:build:debug
scripts.release:all:with-browser: node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && npm run package:win:with-browser && npm run android:build:debug
scripts.build:host: npm run verify:host-env && node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && npm run build
scripts.build:web:host: npm run verify:host-env && node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && vite build
scripts.package:host: npm run verify:host-env && node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && npm run package:win
scripts.package:host:installer: npm run verify:host-env && node scripts/print-release-api.cjs && npm run package:win:installer
scripts.cap:sync:host: npm run build:web:host && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:release:host: npm run cap:sync:host && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs clean assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs debug
scripts.android:build:store:host: npm run cap:sync:host && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs clean assembleRelease && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs release
scripts.android:build:debug:host: npm run cap:sync:host && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs debug
scripts.release:host:all: npm run package:host && npm run android:build:release:host
